basic_details.job_title: SSB Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 35 GDMOs & Specialist Doctors Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) has released the official GDMOs & Specialist Doctors Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 35 vacancies have been announced under the SSB GDMOs & Specialist Doctors Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 70 years with qualifications such as MBBS and Post Graduate Degree/Diploma in relevant specialty with internship and experience can attend the Walk-in Interview from 25 May 2026 to 04 June 2026. The official notification PDF and walk-in details are available below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 70 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Specialist (Medicine), Specialist (General Surgery), Specialist (Obs & Gynae), Specialist (Ophthalmologist), Specialist (Radiologist), Specialist (Pathologist), Specialist (Anesthesia): A recognized medical qualification included in the first or Second Schedule or Part II of the third Schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Post-Graduate Degree/Diploma in the concerned Specialty. Experience: 1 ½ years for Post Graduate degree holder & 2 ½ years for Diploma holder in the concerned specialty. General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO): A recognized medical qualification included in the first or Second Schedule or Part II of the third Schedule (other than licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act, 1956. Completion of compulsory rotating internship.

salary_details.details: Specialist Doctors: Rs. 75,000/- - Rs. 85,000/- Per Month General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO): Rs. 75,000/- - Rs. 85,000/- Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SSB recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on different dates for various locations: 25th May 2026 in Siliguri, 28th May 2026 in Guwahati, 1st June 2026 in Lucknow, and 4th June 2026 in Patna.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies announced by SSB?
faq.answer: Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB) has announced a total of 35 vacancies for GDMOs & Specialist Doctors posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Specialist Doctor posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a recognized medical qualification and a Post-Graduate Degree/Diploma in the concerned specialty, along with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these SSB posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 70 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the GDMO and Specialist Doctor positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 75,000/- to Rs. 85,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SSB recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the SSB GDMOs & Specialist Doctors posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Walk-in Interview followed by a Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person at the specified venue and date.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interviews be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews will be conducted at Frontier Hqr SSB locations in Siliguri, Guwahati, Lucknow, and Patna.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for SSB recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interviews are scheduled on different dates for various locations: 25th May 2026 in Siliguri, 28th May 2026 in Guwahati, 1st June 2026 in Lucknow, and 4th June 2026 in Patna.
